description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem substation switching devices. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, rarray = astaswdevreal(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: Flag indicating which subsystem substations to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the substation switching device quantities desired For the following, values are returned in MW, Mvar, or MVA For the following, values are returned in units determined by the power option setting . (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

string.description: Branch current loading in per unit.
Percent current loading of rating set 1.
Percent current loading of rating set 2.
Percent current loading of rating set 3.
Percent MVA loading of rating set 1.
Percent MVA loading of rating set 2.
Percent MVA loading of rating set 3.
Active power flow at the from node end, in MW.
Reactive power flow at the from node end, in Mvar.
abs(P+jQ) at the from node end, in MVA.
Active power flow at the from node end (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power flow at the from node end (units determined by power output options).
abs(P+jQ) at the from node end (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
